name: CompanyOS
description:
A complete operating system for a one-person company building with AI
agents. 17 components plus 13 universal skills covering session protocol,
decision discipline, incident recovery, multi-target publishing, and the
handful of habits that turn one operator plus Claude Code into a
functioning company. Designed to be vendored, edited, and made yours.
creator: olijboyd

components.description: Senior-leadership decision memo before non-trivial proposals — seven sections, four attacks.
Self-attack pass before commit — scope creep, failure modes, rollback, shipping-gate simulation.
Post-build third-party adversarial review — find what the builder missed.
Diagnose-first sequence under pressure. Read-only probes, propose fix, confirm destructive step, verify after.
External-string discipline — owned terms, required triplets, banned substitutes, formatting rules.
When a stated fact is contested, generate fresh probe evidence rather than restate the claim.
When the operator says 'what's next?' — cross-ground reality, surface drift, present three named lanes, recommend one.
Persistent memory across sessions — four-type taxonomy, what NOT to save, structured body.
Universal service-freeze recovery sequence — diagnose, verify-data-safe, kill, restart, capture pattern.
Sequencing pattern for changes spanning multiple repos / packages / deploy targets with different mechanisms.
Ceremony for first externally-visible actions — dry-run, scoped run, operator confirmation, post-action verification.
Add a rich-context entry to the project's rolling changelog — the why beyond commit messages.
End-of-session ritual — archive previous, summarise this, update state, enrich changelog.
Root operating instructions for an AI-instructed company. Loads at agent session start.
Generic operator-runbook template — adapt placeholders to your project.
How skills, justfile, and constitutions compose without contaminating each other.
The four-type memory taxonomy — user, feedback, project, reference.

provenance.note: Authored by TomeVault (founder + Claude Code) through six weeks of working sessions. Every skill is dogfooded by the company that authored it — same files, same triggers, same patterns of thought.
